message:
refactor(executor): add filterByIndices generic helper for DRY

Consolidate repeated index filtering pattern across 17+ occurrences
using a comptime generic function. Each pattern reduced from 3 lines
to 1 line.

executor.zig: 4325 → 4263 lines (-62 lines)
Total: 6377 → 4263 lines (-2114 lines, ~33%)
